name: part_005
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_005.mov

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal performs 'Ikenai Taiyou' with Amatsuka Pururu, Akami Karubi, and Zuzuzu.
Aki and the guests talk after the song performance and introduce themselves.

subtitles.original: ...濡れた髪を撫でた そして Ah Ah Ah
subtitles.english: ...Stroked the wet hair, and then Ah Ah Ah

subtitles.original: ABC 続かない そんなんじゃダメじゃない
subtitles.english: ABC won't continue, isn't that just no good?

subtitles.original: だって心の奥は違うんじゃない
subtitles.english: Because deep in your heart, it's different, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 俺の青春 そんなもんじゃない
subtitles.english: My youth isn't something like that

subtitles.original: 熱く奥で果てたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to reach the end in the heat

subtitles.original: きっと君じゃなきゃやだよ
subtitles.english: It's got to be you or I don't want it

subtitles.original: 俺はイケナイ太陽
subtitles.english: I'm the naughty sun

subtitles.original: Na na na...
subtitles.english: Na na na...

subtitles.original: 赤い糸なんて嘘っぱち
subtitles.english: The red thread of fate is just a lie

subtitles.original: でもしたごころでさえ信じたいな
subtitles.english: But I want to believe even in ulterior motives

subtitles.original: 俺は正しい 君も正しい
subtitles.english: I'm right, you're right

subtitles.original: とにかくもう左右されないぜ
subtitles.english: Anyway, I won't be swayed anymore

subtitles.original: 騙し騙され胸を突くような
subtitles.english: Deceiving and being deceived, like a piercing in the chest

subtitles.original: 芝居がより盛り上げるよ
subtitles.english: The acting makes it more exciting

subtitles.original: 息が耳に触れた二人 Ah Ah Ah
subtitles.english: Breaths touched our ears, the two of us Ah Ah Ah

subtitles.original: ABC 続かない そんなんじゃダメじゃない
subtitles.english: ABC won't continue, isn't that just no good?

subtitles.original: だって心の奥は違うんじゃない
subtitles.english: Because deep in your heart, it's different, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 私の青春 そんなもんじゃない
subtitles.english: My youth isn't something like that

subtitles.original: 熱く奥で果てたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to reach the end in the heat

subtitles.original: きっと君じゃなきゃやだよ
subtitles.english: It's got to be you or I don't want it

subtitles.original: 私イケナイ太陽
subtitles.english: I'm the naughty sun

subtitles.original: 交わす言葉の記憶と口元の動きにギュッとなる
subtitles.english: The memories of exchanged words and the movement of your mouth make me tight

subtitles.original: 濡れた髪を撫でた そして Ah Ah Ah
subtitles.english: Stroked the wet hair, and then Ah Ah Ah

subtitles.original: ABC
subtitles.english: ABC

subtitles.original: ABC 続かない そんなんじゃダメじゃない
subtitles.english: ABC won't continue, isn't that just no good?

subtitles.original: だって心の奥は違うんじゃない
subtitles.english: Because deep in your heart, it's different, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 俺たちの青春 そんなもんじゃない
subtitles.english: Our youth isn't something like that

subtitles.original: 熱く奥で果てたいよ
subtitles.english: We want to reach the end in the heat

subtitles.original: きっと君じゃなきゃやだよ
subtitles.english: It's got to be you or I don't want it

subtitles.original: 俺はイケナイ太陽
subtitles.english: I'm the naughty sun

subtitles.original: 絡み合う糸は君と
subtitles.english: The intertwining threads are with you

subtitles.original: 俺を結ぶ赤い糸
subtitles.english: The red thread connecting me

subtitles.original: （はあ…はあ…）
subtitles.english: (Pant... pant...)

subtitles.original: みんな... 来てくれて
subtitles.english: Everyone... for coming

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: thank you!

subtitles.original: ということで、お友達が来てくれたので
subtitles.english: And so, since my friends are here

subtitles.original: せっかくなので自己紹介してもらおうと思います！
subtitles.english: I'm going to have them introduce themselves!

subtitles.original: まずはぷるるんから！
subtitles.english: First off, from Pururun!

subtitles.original: はーい！おはぷれ！
subtitles.english: Hi! Ohapure!

subtitles.original: 天使と悪魔のぷるぷるエンジェルデビル、甘塚ぷるるです！
subtitles.english: Half angel, half devil, Puru Puru Angel Devil, Amatsuka Pururu!

subtitles.original: あきろぜちゃ、お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Akiroze-cha, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: いやあ、とっても楽しかったです！
subtitles.english: Man, it was so much fun!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！最高！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Supreme!

subtitles.original: そして続いてかるびちゃ！
subtitles.english: And next, Karubi-cha!

subtitles.original: はい、お肉の国のお姫様、赤見かるびです！
subtitles.english: Hi, Princess of the Meat Country, Akami Karubi!

subtitles.original: あきろぜ、誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Akiroze, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: いやライブって、お友達とライブ初めてだからさ
subtitles.english: You know, a live performance, it's my first live with friends

subtitles.original: まじで嬉しかったよ
subtitles.english: so I was really happy.

subtitles.original: 本当？
subtitles.english: Really?

subtitles.original: ありがと呼んでくれて
subtitles.english: Thanks for inviting me.

subtitles.original: またやろうね！
subtitles.english: Let's do it again!

subtitles.original: また！
subtitles.english: Again!

subtitles.original: はーい！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Hi! Thank you!

subtitles.original: 素晴らしい！そして最後に
subtitles.english: Wonderful! And finally

subtitles.original: ずずさん！
subtitles.english: Zuzu-san!

subtitles.original: はい！僕のこと知らない人いると思うんで自己紹介だけさせてください！
subtitles.english: Hi! I think there are people who don't know me, so let me just introduce myself!

subtitles.original: 雨降ってザーザー 諸々事態はジージー
subtitles.english: Rain falling za-za, various situations are ji-ji

subtitles.original: 俺の名前はずずずずずず、ずずでございます！
subtitles.english: My name is Zu-zu-zu-zu-zu-zu, it's Zuzuzu!

subtitles.original: いやあ、お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Man, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: （笑い）疲れた
subtitles.english: (Laughs) Tired
